name: tobe_sql_generation
objective: Generate one executable Oracle/MyBatis TO-BE SQL statement that preserves the source result set while following TO-BE schema mappings.
rules: Use TO_TABLE and TO_COL mappings as the primary source of truth.
Preserve query structure, filter intent, aggregation intent, join intent, and bind parameter names when possible.
Keep MyBatis placeholders exactly as valid MyBatis placeholders.
Do not output commentary, markdown, JSON, multiple statements, PL/SQL, or semicolons.
Return exactly one executable Oracle/MyBatis SQL statement.
user_instruction: Generate one executable Oracle SQL statement only.
